crash.title: Something went wrong
crash.body: The app hit an unexpected error.

tagPicker.title: Tag this article
tagPicker.empty: No tags yet — create one below.

addFeed.title: Add feed
addFeed.hint: Paste a feed URL, a website URL, or a YouTube / Reddit / Mastodon link — Papr figures out the rest.
addFeed.newsletterHint: Poll an IMAP mailbox so email newsletters arrive as articles. Use an app-specific password.
addFeed.discoverPlaceholder: Search feeds, or paste a URL…
addFeed.discoverNoResults: No feeds found — try a different keyword or paste a URL.
addFeed.discoverError: Search failed — check your connection and try again.

explore.title: Explore feeds
explore.subtitle: Browse a curated directory of well-known feeds.
explore.feedCount: {{n}} curated feeds — pick a category, then subscribe.
explore.error: Couldn't load the directory — try again.
explore.noResults: Nothing matches — try another keyword or category.

articleList.emptyState: No articles here — enjoy the calm

commandPalette.actionMarkAllRead: Mark all in current list as read
commandPalette.searchPlaceholder: Search articles, feeds, or run a command…

reader.emptySelectArticle: Select an article to start reading
reader.providerEmpty: The provider returned an empty body
reader.aiDisclaimer: Generated by a local model · For reference only · May be inaccurate

general.autoRefreshDesc: Periodically check feeds for updates in the background
general.refreshIntervalDesc: Shorter intervals drain the battery faster
general.markReadOnOpen: Mark as read when opening an article
general.markReadOnScroll: Mark as read when scrolled to the bottom
general.markReadOnScrollDesc: Good for quickly skimming long lists
general.launchAtLoginDesc: Start Papr automatically in the background after login
general.startupViewDesc: The view shown by default next time you open the app

appearance.languageDesc: Display language of the app interface
appearance.appearanceDesc: Affects the light/dark mode of the whole app
appearance.densityDesc: Affects list row height and spacing
appearance.reduceMotionDesc: Turn off interface transitions and animations

reading.bodyFontDesc: Hyperlegible is tuned for low-vision readability
reading.readingTimeDesc: Show estimated reading time in the article info bar
reading.autoExtractDesc: When opening a summary-only article, automatically fetch the full page content

subscriptions.opmlExported: OPML exported to the Downloads folder

filters.title: Filter rules
filters.intro: Rules run on every new article as it arrives — and, when you save, on matching articles you already have. Skip noisy keywords, or auto mark-read / star the things you care about.
filters.confirmSkipMessage: This discard rule matches {{count}} articles you already have. Saving will permanently delete them — this can't be undone. New articles will still be filtered going forward.

sync.syncHint: Syncing pulls feeds from FreshRSS and aligns read / starred state both ways. It also runs automatically each time feeds are refreshed.
sync.connectHint: Connect to a self-hosted FreshRSS server to sync subscriptions and reading state across devices.
sync.reasonOauth: Requires OAuth developer credentials, not yet supported
sync.reasonEntitlements: Requires native macOS entitlements, not yet supported
sync.syncDone: Sync complete · aligned the state of {{count}} articles

readwise.title: Readwise Reader
readwise.hint: Pull saved documents from Readwise Reader into Papr as a read-only feed. Uses the API token shared with the highlights integration.
readwise.tokenDesc: Personal Readwise access token. Generate one at readwise.io/access_token.
readwise.categoryDesc: Which Reader category to pull on each sync. Leave unset to pull every category.
readwise.withHtmlDesc: Request the document body with each pull. Larger payload but the article is fully readable offline.

notifications.allowDesc: Show a system notification when new articles arrive after a refresh
notifications.badgeDesc: Show the unread article count on the Dock icon
notifications.soundDesc: Play the system sound when a notification appears

advanced.dedupDesc: When multiple feeds push the same link, keep only the first one fetched
advanced.retentionDesc: Read articles older than this are cleaned up automatically (starred and read-later excluded)
advanced.cleanupNowDesc: Run a one-time cleanup using the retention setting above
advanced.vacuumDesc: Reclaim disk space used by deleted articles (VACUUM)
advanced.cleanupForever: Currently set to keep forever, no cleanup performed
advanced.concurrencyDesc: How many feeds to refresh at the same time at most
advanced.resetSettingsDesc: Clear all preferences and configuration; feeds and articles are unaffected
advanced.resetConfirm: This will clear all app settings (including AI, sync, and network configuration). Feeds and articles are unaffected. Continue?
advanced.clearDataDesc: Delete all feeds and articles — cannot be undone
advanced.clearConfirm: This will permanently delete all feeds, folders, and articles, and cannot be undone. Exporting OPML first is recommended. Continue?
advanced.aiProviderDesc: The LLM provider used to generate article summaries
advanced.aiApiKeyDesc: The key is stored only in the local database and is never uploaded
advanced.aiModelDesc: Leave blank to use the provider's default model
advanced.aiBaseUrlDesc: API endpoint root. Leave blank for the provider's official endpoint, or point to any compatible provider (OpenRouter, Groq, DeepSeek, a local server)
advanced.translateLangDesc: The language articles are translated into. Defaults to the interface language

about.creditsFonts: Inter Tight by Rasmus Andersson · Newsreader by Production Type
about.creditsRender: CJK text rendered with PingFang SC · accent colors from the OKLCH color space
about.creditsThanks: Thanks to everyone who maintains open standards — RSS keeps independent writing reachable.

sidebar.emptyHint: No feeds yet. Click + to add one.
sidebar.dropUngroup: Drop here to remove from folder
sidebar.clearItemsConfirm: Delete every locally-synced article for “{{feed}}”? The subscription stays — only the cached items are removed. The next refresh will repopulate from upstream.
sidebar.tagsEmptyHint: Tag articles while reading to group them here.

error.noAiKey: No AI API key set — add one in Settings → Advanced
error.tagNameExists: A tag with that name already exists
error.folderNameExists: A folder with that name already exists
error.emptyRuleQuery: Enter at least one keyword for the rule
error.noFeedFound: No feed found at that URL
error.responseTooLarge: The server's response was too large
error.alreadySubscribed: You are already subscribed to this feed
error.noArticleUrl: This article has no source URL
error.noArticleBody: This article has no text to summarize
error.noExtractableContent: Couldn’t extract readable content from that page
error.emptyFullTextResponse: The full-text provider returned an empty page
error.freshrssLoginFailed: FreshRSS login failed — check the server URL, username and password
error.freshrssNoToken: FreshRSS did not return an auth token
error.youtubeChannelNotFound: Couldn't find a YouTube channel id on that page
error.newsletterMissingFields: Enter the IMAP host, username and password
error.newsletterPollTimeout: The IMAP server didn't respond in time — check the host, port and your network
error.noNotionToken: Add your Notion integration token in Settings → Integrations
error.noNotionPage: Set the target Notion page id in Settings → Integrations
error.noPocketConfig: Add your Pocket consumer key and access token in Settings → Integrations
error.noInstapaperConfig: Add your Instapaper username and password in Settings → Integrations
error.noKindleConfig: Configure your Kindle address and SMTP server in Settings → Integrations
error.noReadwiseToken: Add your Readwise API token in Settings → Integrations
error.noReadwiseFeed: The Readwise Reader feed is missing — restart Papr to run the database migration
error.readwiseRateLimited: Readwise returned 429 after the Retry-After backoff window — try again later
error.emptyReadwiseToken: Enter a Readwise API token before saving
error.readwiseTokenInvalid: Readwise rejected the token — it may be invalid or expired
